programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The 2017 murder of famed hairstylist Fabio Sementilli who was found stabbed to death by his pool in Los Angeles. At first, police believed he was the victim of the “knock-knock” burglars, a ring targeting Hollywood celebrities.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: An investigation into the sometimes questionable practices in the business of international adoptions and how some overseas facilitators walk a fine line between adoption and child trafficking.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the moral dilemma faced by Jim Morel, a Massachusetts musician, who was told by another musician friend, Jason Weir, that the 2001 death of Marina Calabro, the aunt of their bandmate Anthony Calabro, though ruled an accident, was murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Part two of a two-part report on the investigation into the 2012 death of 29-year-old lawyer Ryan Poston, at the hands of his on-again/off-again girlfriend Shayna Hubers, who admits to killing him, but and claims it was self-defense.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: On May 2, 1996, the body of Kent Leppink was found off a deserted road in Alaska. He had been shot three times. Police discovered that he had been involved with Mechele Hughes, a young woman who worked as a stripper in a club.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 1989 disappearance of college student Tiffany Sessions, a case which at the time generated one of the largest manhunts in the history of Florida.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on Mike Williams, a missing Florida man who was believed to have been eaten by alligators in December 2000, and his mother's belief that something sinister happened

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 1960 murder of Irena Garza, in McAllen, Texas, and the efforts that family members and police have taken to bring the suspect, a Roman Catholic priest, to trial for the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on questions surrounding the apparent suicide of Jocelyn Earnest, a successful businesswoman who was found dead in her home in December 2007, from a gunshot wound to her head, with a revolver by her side and a suicide note on the floor.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the triple murders and the long quest for justice for Vicki Friedli, her boyfriend Jon Hayward, and Vicki's daughter Becky Friedli.

programme.desc: Ex-special forces soldier John Gold agrees to retrieve a hated foe in exchange for an expunged record.

programme.title: CatDog

programme.desc: A tough, new outlaw mailman arrives in town. Cat's Swedish penpal, Ingrid, comes for a visit.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Realizing he has only one life (in contrast to Cat's nine), Dog becomes ultra-safety consious. Tired of Cat's parental ways, Dog runs away from home.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Strange neighbors suddenly appear across the street and Dog, obsessed with sci-fi comic books, thinks that they are aliens from outer space. After staying up all night, Dog is sound asleep on the day CatDog are to be interviewed for a TV show.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cat tries out for the musical theater production of Abe Lincoln: Superstar! but is dismayed when Dog inadvertently gets the lead role. Dog discovers that another canine has tresspassed upon his favorite fire hydrant.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Dog is dismayed to learn that his favorite milkbones are banned from Nearburg. Dog eats too many pecan pies and a pecan tree begins to grow in his head.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: CatDog go on a mission to find pesky Gopher, who has ruined Cat's vegetable garden, and stolen Dog's bones from his bone cellar. Dog's up to his old tricks again, this time chasing a landing airplane all the way to the airport.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cat pulls out a dusty tome, Cats Through History in order to teach Dog about feline royal treatment in Egypt. Winslow catches Cat in the act of reading Dog's diary and blackmails him into becoming his personal slave.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Frustrated Cat buys Dog educational videos to smarten him up. Winslow wakes up one morning to find CatDog gone.

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: In an effort to get Dog to notice her, Greaser Dog Shriek goes to to Randolph's Charm School and House of Beauty. Dog inadvertantly saves Mayor Rancid Rabbit from being crushed by the world's largest hamburger.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug Can't Dance/Doug Gets Busted: Doug is excited about attending the school dance with Patti until the class bully, Roger, reminds him that he can't dance.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug's Dog Date/Doug's Big Nose: Porkchop falls in love with an alluring girl dog, and Doug fears he will lose Porkchop as his best friend. When Skeeter's baby brother Dale calls Doug "big nose", he becomes obsessed with his schnozz.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug Takes A Hike/Doug Rocks: When Doug goes camping with the Bluffscouts, Roger chooses him as his partner and makes him do all the work. Doug and Skeeter win tickets to see their favorite rock group, the Beets, but Skeeter is grounded.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug Can't Dig It/Doug Didn't Do It: Doug is mortified when his sister Judy plans to perform at a school assembly, and he has to introduce her. Roger steals Vice-Principal Lamarr Bone's yodelling trophy, but all the evidence points to Doug.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug Mayor For A Day/Doug's No Dummy: On a field trip to Bluffington town hall, Doug steps in for the mayor and inadvertently saves the town from a major meltdown at the ice cream factory. Doug performs a ventriloquist routine for the school talent show.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug To the Rescue/Doug's Cool Shoes: When Roger bothers Patti, Doug imagines he's Quailman, a superhero who fights with the powers of a quail. Doug wants to trade in his old sneakers for the new Sky Davis Inflatable Air Jet Shoe.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug Gets His Ears Lowered/Doug On The Wild Side: Doug narrowly escapes the clutches of crazy hair stylists, including “Fluke,” the most dangerous haircutter in Bluffington. Doug's wild Grandma Opal takes him on an exciting new adventure.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug's Big Catch/Doug Needs Money: At the Big Bass-Off fishing contest, Doug teams up with Mr. Dink to catch the fish who stole Dink's wallet 30 years earlier. When Doug and Skeeter accidentally break Mr. Dink's custom grill just before his big barbecue.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug's Runaway Journal/Doug's Doodle: Doug accidentally hands in his doodle of Mrs. Wingo with his homework assignment and fantasizes how Smash Adams, secret agent, might get it back. After searching all over town for his lost journal.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug and Patti run into trouble when they team up for a school cooking contest. Doug seeks everyone's advice before his first babysitting assignment—watching Skeeter's baby brother, Dale.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug imagines that he is Quailman and must use his powers to battle the evil Dr. Klotzenstein. When Coach Spitz refuses Patti a spot on the softball team because she's a girl, she challenges the school team to play her team.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold trains Grandpa to take on his old Chinese checkers nemesis, Robby Fisher. Miriam decides to visit her mother after learning that Big Bob and Helga are on vacation at the same time.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Like his Grandfather before him, Arnold competes in the annual block party eating contest. After intense training, Arnold meets an area eating legend, Seymour “The Disposal,” in a final showdown.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: After the kids find out that Big Bob is planning on cutting down “Mighty Pete” the oldest tree in the neighborhood, Arnold organizes a campaign to save the tree.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Eugene becomes disillusioned about his life after learning that his favorite movie action hero doesn't do his own stunts. Arnold helps him out of his funk.

programme.title: Drake and Josh
programme.desc: When the Premiere Movie Theater plays host to an actual movie premiere, Josh must act as personal assistant to the film's high maintenance child star.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: Marshall bets his neighbor that Ferguson can make the varsity football team. Ferguson, tempted by the offer of a cellular phone, practices in the backyard and proves himself inept.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: Clarissa inadvertently walks out of a clothing store with a bustier she didn't pay for. She is overcome with guilt and has nightmares about being a hunted criminal. Sam and Ferguson want to know why Clarissa is suddenly so paranoid.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: Clarissa is glad her grandparents are the one thing in her life that never changes. She looks forward to their visit because she gets to be the DJ at their anniversary party and also plan non-stressful activities for these old-timers.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: Sam sets up himself and Clarissa on a double-blind date. Clarissa is besieged by visions of a blind date from hell. But after Sam describes how cool her date is, she begins to think that she might be the geek.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel
programme.desc: Roger is planning a surprise anniversary party for Sheryl. Too bad Kenan and Kel are in charge of picking up the cake and Sheryl's gift.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel
programme.desc: Kenan and Kel take an I.Q. test and Kel scores higher than Kenan. When the guys go to talk to Principal Dimly about the test, Kel accidentally leaves incriminating evidence in the office.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel
programme.desc: There's a rat loose in Rigby's. It's up to Kenan and Kel to capture it before the exterminator gets to the rat.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel
programme.desc: While Kenan and Kel are in Kenan's room playing Penguin Hunter, the Rockmore's house is robbed. Kenan and Kel try and stall his parents from coming home before they can see what has happened.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel

programme.title: Kenan & Kel
programme.desc: Kenan and Kel adopt a chimpanzee through the zoo's adopt-a-critter program. After the guys are informed that their pet is being transferred, Kel decides that he's going to kidnap the monkey. Too bad he loses the monkey shortly thereafter.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel

programme.title: All Grown Up

programme.title: All Grown Up
programme.desc: When Grandpa Lou's buddy Red challenges the kids to work his dude ranch, Tommy jumps at the chance to prove himself, and drags the rest of the Rats along with him.

programme.title: All Grown Up

programme.desc: Susie coaches Harold to help him get a date with Angelica. He soon becomes the most popular boy in school. Meanwhile, Dil tries to play Cupid himself as he helps Vice-Principal Pangborn woo Miss O'Keats.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and Steven Moore are antiques hunting in the Northeast. Vintage luggage and a pill box surprise at auction, while Steven gets familiar with a Sunderland sailor's story.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Scotland's Roo Irvine and Steven Moore from Newcastle search for antiques in Yorkshire. Expect flat caps, pork pies and some Chinese porcelain that earns one expert a great profit.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita Marriott and Phil Serrell embark on a new Road Trip. Purchases include a garden fountain and a home-made post box. Phil wears shorts and Irita runs away to the circus.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita and Phil encounter a great bustard and a lesser spotted Dunhill while touring Norfolk and Lincolnshire. Phil also turns magpie with the silver but who will fly at auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil spends every last penny, while Irita buys a vase for a pound. Irita favours mutton sleeves in Hull, while Phil steps out of the classic car to be turned into a pumpkin.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Irita and Phil's last outing in the gold classic car and the pressure gauge is reading high! Can Mr Serrell clutch victory just as they race towards the finish line?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Norfolk, Irita Marriott finds a 19th century automaton and learns about a hero from The Great War. Raj Bisram buys a damaged Stoneware Doulton flask and discovers how Princess Catherine helped rescue Jewish families from Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Up in Northamptonshire, Irita Marriott picks up a B&B sign and a Japanese Satsuma pot, while Raj Bisram finds an Art Deco silver trinket box and a kaleidoscope from 1905. Plus a visit to the only surviving medieval town belfry in England.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott head to Oxfordshire in their 1978 MG Midget. Irita finds some hefty items and Raj discovers some items no gardener should be without. The day ends at an auction held in a former railway station hotel.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are at Bodnant Garden in north Wales, where findings include a pair of unique Wedgewood tigers, a carved Russian chair and a silver box with a political connection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: The story of efforts to save the pangolin, the world's most illegally trafficked animal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Fuerza excesiva
programme.desc: Frank debe decidir si defiende a su hijo Danny, acusado de usar fuerza excesiva, o la reputación de la policía. Jamie se conecta con una doctora después de llevar a un indigente al hospital.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Habladora
programme.desc: Jamie es atacado por un matón vengativo después de intervenir en su relación abusiva con su novia. Frank enfrenta un escándalo político por comentarios insensibles de Henry que fueron grabados ilegalmente y filtrados a la prensa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El más buscado
programme.desc: Frank y Danny buscan encarcelar a un delincuente internacional que siempre se libra de cargos por asesinato, pero les falta evidencia para una condena. Erin considera dejar su trabajo para ejercer en la práctica privada.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Mata al mensajero
programme.desc: Frank se sorprende en una entrevista en vivo cuando él y el fiscal interino discrepan sobre un tema. Danny y su nuevo jefe chocan en sus métodos y personalidades mientras investigan un tiroteo desde un auto.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras Hotch lucha por su vida debido a las complicaciones del apuñalamiento a manos de George Foyet, también conocido como "The Reaper", experimenta visiones de su difunta esposa, Haley, y su némesis, Foyet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga a las víctimas de posibles asesinatos rituales en Utah, las pistas los llevan a creer que el sujeto que buscan podría estar fascinado con los juicios de brujas de Salem.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Verdad o consecuencias
programme.desc: Mientras comienza la búsqueda del sustituto de Ziva, Gibbs y los miembros restantes de su equipo deben volver al trabajo con el pasado todavía pesando en sus mentes.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Reunión
programme.desc: El equipo descubre que la extraña muerte de un marine y sus dos amigos puede estar relacionada con su pasado, pero es Gibbs quien acaba haciendo un viaje al pasado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Informante
programme.desc: El equipo debe investigar de nuevo la muerte de un teniente después de que el bloguero que les acusó de encubrimiento aparezca muerto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Policía bueno, policía malo
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un marine aparece al otro lado del mundo, la investigación obliga a Ziva a desenterrar un capítulo enterrado de su vida.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Mata al mensajero
programme.desc: Frank se sorprende en una entrevista en vivo cuando él y el fiscal interino discrepan sobre un tema. Danny y su nuevo jefe chocan en sus métodos y personalidades mientras investigan un tiroteo desde un auto.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El poder de la prensa
programme.desc: Frank enfrenta críticas públicas por una cámara corporal defectuosa durante un altercado. Danny y María protegen a un informante que es rechazado por el programa de protección de testigos.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress call at a local tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are left to solve the crime after signs of an apparent stabbing. A man loiters in a private park. A driver insists that the car is his - even though he needs a screwdriver to start the ignition and the plates are stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist on a call regarding a fight at a local residence. On a felony stop a juvenile male with a firearm is detained. Officers respond to a report of a man firing a gun in front of his residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reverse drug operation, designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics from undercover officers, proves successful for officers in both Tampa, FL and Palm Beach County, FL. Officers are in search of a burglary suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The occupants of a car try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known for illicit sexual activity. Officer investigates a robbery claim at a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A boyfriend fights a man who’s just groped his girlfriend. Police make several drug related arrests while patrolling the streets of New Orleans on a particularly raucous evening. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers make an arrest in a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a man who’s suspiciously parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer involved in a fight. A brazen female driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving, she is eventually handcuffed but not without a fight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score drugs. Officers respond to a domestic violence call. Officers assist on a shots fired call, in which the suspect asserts that the weapon went off “accidentally”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcycle going 100mph. A Florida man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother. Police arrest a man who is pulled over for expired tags and end up seizing a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police use footage to make an arrest for burglary, battery and resisting arrest. Police respond to a disturbance call and officers attempt to help the two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested after getting caught peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase officers bring down a well-known local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a local mobile home park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A young man on a bicycle is charged with possession of drug paraphernalia and public intoxication. A man whose tags expired by a few years is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist in rescuing a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with the extraction of a man from his vehicle after a car wreck. An officer spots an apartment fire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over who the narcotics belong to. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in New Jersey is arrested for possession. A couple is pulled over while driving around a known drug zone looking to score and the boyfriend is arrested for an outstanding warrant. A routine traffic stop turns into a fruitful drug bust.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: There police arrest a bicycling drug dealer and his female client. Police respond to a call of an unhinged Rottweiler. Officers arrest an inebriated man after they spot him grabbing a female bystander.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the body of a naked dead man is discovered by Dr. Robbins' wife in their master bedroom, it leads to a lot of questions for the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Willows works with the FBI again after a professional hit occurs at a law firm she's recommended to her friend.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team says goodbye to Catherine Willows as she makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead and her hair is done up '70s style complete with vintage clothes, the CSI team discovers clues that point to a killer with a hair fetish.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell asks for advice from a former colleague on a case involving the death of a man's ex-girlfriend. Elisabeth Shue Joins The Cast As New CSI Julie Finlay.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a house is stolen completely off its foundation, the CSIs are on the case in search of answers. Meanwhile, new CSI Julie Finlay showcases her skill in blood analysis.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a blackout cripples the city, the CSIs must revert to old-school methods to solve the case of a missing child.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are brought in to solve the case of a recently murdered student whose death photo ends up trending on the Internet.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team is called in to investigate a robbery-homicide at an "Alice In Wonderland"-themed wedding, they have little to work with to find a killer. (Jaclyn Smith guest stars)

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team is called in to investigate a man who is shot at point-blank range in a local casino, they shut down the entire building to find their killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Stokes learns that a man he helped put in prison is going to have his conviction overturned, the CSI team needs to prove the killer is guilty again or he will be released.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a bomb kills an off-road race truck driver mid-race, the CSI team is called on the scene to investigate why.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates three dead bodies just blocks away from a campaign dinner, they think they know who the killer is before making a shocking discovery.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: D.B. Russell's granddaughter was kidnapped in last season's finale cliffhanger and now he leads the CSI team on a hunt to find her, on the 13th season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Willows vuelve a trabajar con el FBI después de que ocurre un golpe profesional en un bufete de abogados que ella recomendó a su amiga.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se despide de Catherine Willows mientras toma una decisión que cambiará su vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer es encontrada muerta y su cabello arreglado al estilo de los años 70 y ropa vintage, el equipo de CSI descubre pistas que apuntan a un asesino con un fetiche por el cabello.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell pide consejo a una antigua colega sobre un caso relacionado con la muerte de la exnovia de un hombre. Elisabeth Shue se une al elenco como la nueva CSI Julie Finlay.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una casa es totalmente robada de sus cimientos, el equipo de CSI busca respuestas. Mientras tanto, la nueva CSI Julie Finlay muestra su habilidad en el análisis de sangre.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark and his crew save a cabin with sawn logs and a surprising history.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The guys fight vicious winds to save a giant double pen barn in Ohio.

programme.title: Kate And Leopold ES
programme.desc: Meg Ryan y Hugh Jackman son amantes que descubren que la pasión y la cortesía nunca están fuera de moda, cuando los une un quiebre en el tiempo. Los viajes en el tiempo con toques de comedia romántica nunca han sido tan encantadores.

programme.title: La terminal
programme.desc: Luego de llegar al aeropuerto JFK de Nueva York, Viktor Navorski se encuentra atrapado involuntariamente en vaivenes burocráticos que no le permiten regresar a su país ni entrar a los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Chocolate
programme.desc: Johnny Depp y Juliette Binoche protagonizan esta comedia romántica dulce y sexi que enamoró al público y ganó 5 nominaciones al Óscar(r), incluso Mejor Película, que se centra en una chocolatería en un pequeño pueblo francés.

programme.title: Shakespeare apasionado
programme.desc: Lady Viola inspira a Will Shakespeare, cura su bloqueo de escritor y reaviva su amor por el romance. Gwyneth Paltrow, Joseph Fiennes, Ben Affleck y Dame Judi Dench protagonizan esta historia ganadora del Óscar a Mejor Película.

programme.title: El Paciente Inglés
programme.desc: Poderosa e inolvidable, la ganadora de 9 premios Óscar, incluso Mejor Película, Mejor Director (Anthony Minghella) y Mejor Actriz de Reparto (Juliette Binoche), desarrolla una increíble historia de pasión, intriga y aventura.

programme.title: Juan Colorado
programme.desc: El norteño Juan, se enamora de la machorra Silvia, pero, su padre la quiere casar con un tal Rafael, el cual por celos y envidia, se une al padre de Silvia, para acabar con Juan. Ella al darse cuenta de lo que sucede, se viste como Juan para salvarlo.

programme.title: Alazán y enamorado
programme.desc: Un ranchero con temple debe lidiar con que su caballo se ha enamorado de Lady Godiva, la yegua de su vecina, una mujer fuerte y decidida. Mientras buscan una solución para el romance de sus caballos, entre ellos también surgirá el amor.

programme.title: Los hermanos del hierro
programme.desc: Reynaldo y Martín Del Hierro son testigos del asesinato de su padre por parte de Pascual Velazco. Mientras crecen, son envenenados por el deseo de venganza de su madre, pero una vez que lo consiguen cambiará sus vidas para siempre.

programme.title: Aquí Está Tu Enamorado
programme.desc: Antonio es un apuesto "Don Juan" al que le encantan las mujeres, pero huye del matrimonio como del diablo. Todo se complicará cuando pretende a la novia del comisiario y la llegada de un "paquete" misterioso.

programme.title: Juan Colorado
programme.desc: El norteño Juan, se enamora de la machorra Silvia, pero, su padre la quiere casar con un tal Rafael, el cual por celos y envidia, se une al padre de Silvia, para acabar con Juan. Ella al darse cuenta de lo que sucede, se viste como Juan para salvarlo.

programme.title: Amor a ritmo de go go
programme.desc: Dos muchachos llegan a la gran ciudad con la intención de conquistarla. En una discoteca Go-Go conocen a Lupe y ahí comienza la acción y la clásica música de Rock & Roll.

programme.title: El camino del oeste
programme.desc: Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum y Richard Widmark protagonizan esta suntuosa historia de los hombres y mujeres que dejaron la comodidad y seguridad de sus vidas por la promesa de una tierra libre y una vida mejor en el indómito Oeste.

programme.title: ¡Agáchate, maldito!
programme.desc: Un desenlace explosivo aguarda a un terrorista irlandés (James Coburn) obsesionado con la dinamita, quien se alía con un campesino mexicano convertido en revolucionario (Rod Steiger) en este trepidante relato de poder y política.

programme.title: Jade
programme.desc: Corelli está hasta el cuello en un caso que puede conducirlo donde no quiere ir. Chazz Palminteri interpreta a Matt, abogado y amigo de Corelli. Linda Fiorentino es la esposa de Matt, Trina; una psicóloga capaz de todo incluso de asesinar.

programme.title: Solo Dios perdona
programme.desc: Only God Forgives reúne la visión del célebre director Nicolas Winding Refn (DRIVE) con Ryan Gosling en un thriller de suspenso ambientado en los sórdidos bajos fondos de Bangkok.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: Una pareja decide ir a conocer los lugares donde se cometieron los crímenes de un libro de asesinos en serie, pero ni se imaginan que no tienen que ir muy lejos para conocer a unos brutales criminales.

programme.title: Arcángel
programme.desc: El profesor Fluke Kelso se encuentra con un misterioso anciano vinculado a Joseph Stalin.

programme.title: Una niñera engañosa
programme.desc: Susan debe recordar la muerte de su esposo para rescatar a su hija luego de su desaparición.

programme.title: Manhattan en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Cuando una viuda seductora le pide a un periodista que resuelva la misteriosa muerte de su marido, la investigación lo sumerge en un peligroso mundo de adulterio, chantaje y asesinato.

programme.title: Bandidos
programme.desc: ¡Prepárate para una comedia de acción de lo más divertida con Bruce Willis, Billy Bob Thornton y Cate Blanchett! Joe (Willis) y Terry (Thornton), dos convictos, arman un plan para robar un banco… hasta que se topan con una ama de casa bastante excéntrica.

programme.title: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: Una epopeya en expansión sobre la familia, la fe, el poder y el petróleo. La historia narra la vida de Daniel Plainview, quien se transforma a sí mismo de un minero de la plata en un magnate petrolero hecho por cuenta propia.

programme.title: 1618 (LAS)
programme.desc: The Inquisition continues the persecution of Portuguese Jews.

programme.title: ¿A quién ama Gilbert Grape?
programme.desc: Ocuparse de Arnie es una tarea que puede ser bastante demandante para Gilbert, al menos mientras trabaja en la tienda local.

programme.title: Aniquilación
programme.desc: Una bióloga (Natalie Portman) y un ex soldado (Oscar Isaac) dirigen una misión en un área de cuarentena misteriosa. “El Resplandor” un hermoso, pero letal mundo de paisajes mutados y criaturas que amenazan la vida en el mundo.

programme.title: Rescatando al soldado Ryan
programme.desc: ¿Por qué están ocho hombres arriesgando sus vidas para salvar solo una? Rodeados de las brutales realidades de la guerra, cada hombre busca su propia respuesta, y la fuerza para triunfar sobre un futuro incierto con honor, decencia y valentía.

programme.title: El curioso caso de Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi
programme.desc: Del director Michael Bay, 13 horas es la historia de un grupo élite de seis ex-militares asignados para proteger a la CIA, que lucharon cuando los terroristas atacaron un complejo diplomático estadounidense el 11 de septiembre de 2012.

programme.title: Shaft (ESP)
programme.desc: Para detener a un asesino racista, Shaft tiene que rastrear al único testigo que puede dejarlo tras las rejas. Shaft se acerca a la par del peligro.

programme.title: Blue tiger: furia en la piel
programme.desc: Una mujer (Virginia Madsen, Duna) dedica su vida a buscar venganza después de que su hijo muere en el fuego cruzado de un ataque de la Yakuza japonesa.

programme.title: Pisando fuerte
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: CAOS
programme.desc: Dos policías, un novato (Phillippe) y un veterano de cabellos grises (Statham), persiguen a un hábil ladrón de bancos (Snipes).

programme.title: Fuera de control
programme.desc: La sociedad moderna traza líneas entre el bien y el mal, la furia y la redención. Un momento de ensimismamiento y una chispa de ira harán que dos hombres las atraviesen. La lucha se intensifica, y las vidas de ambos cambian para siempre.

programme.title: Shaft (ESP)
programme.desc: Para detener a un asesino racista, Shaft tiene que rastrear al único testigo que puede dejarlo tras las rejas. Shaft se acerca a la par del peligro.

programme.title: Minority Report: sentencia previa
programme.desc: Minority Report es sobre un policía del futuro que trabaja en una división del departamento de policía arrestando asesinos antes de que cometan crímenes, gracias a una avanzada tecnología de premoniciones.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: Una narrativa contemporánea del clásico H.G.Wells, esta historia de suspenso y ciencia ficción revela la extraordinaria lucha por el futuro de la humanidad a través de los ojos de una familia americana.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (ESP)
programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar Angelina Jolie reinventa al héroe de acción moderno en la película Lara Croft: Tomb Raider. Lara Croft nació dentro de la opulencia y fue educada en las escuelas más exclusivas

programme.title: Un amable fantasma
programme.desc: La historia, basada en el cuento de Hans Christian Andersen El polvorín. Voita adquiere un polvorín de oro con el que puede conjurar al fantasma y pedirle que cumpla tres deseos.

programme.title: Superagente Cody Banks
programme.desc: Frankie Muniz encarna a un agente juvenil de la CIA en esta mezcla de comedia y acción. Cody Banks es elegido para impedir el complot de un villano que busca apoderarse del mundo. ¡Pero primero, él debe superar su timidez hacia las chicas!

programme.title: Minority Report: sentencia previa
programme.desc: Minority Report es sobre un policía del futuro que trabaja en una división del departamento de policía arrestando asesinos antes de que cometan crímenes, gracias a una avanzada tecnología de premoniciones.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: Una narrativa contemporánea del clásico H.G.Wells, esta historia de suspenso y ciencia ficción revela la extraordinaria lucha por el futuro de la humanidad a través de los ojos de una familia americana.

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: Los reyes pal palacio
programme.desc: Momentos divertidos al lado de los talentosos Miguel Céspedes y Raymond Pozo, con más de 600 programas de televisión producidos y viendo la sonrisa de la gente de manera directa en los espectáculos que han realizado en vivo.

programme.title: Dos a la carta
programme.desc: Dos hombres, Óscar, un exitoso financiero casado con una mujer muy ambiciosa, y Dani, un campesino, acaban de descubrir que son hermanos. Ahora se ven obligados a trabajar juntos en un restaurante que les tocó en herencia en un maravilloso entorno rural.

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policía? 2 1/2
programme.desc: Frank Drebin (Leslie Nielsen) adora el misterio. ¿Por qué estamos aquí? ¿Hay vida después del sexo? Sí, aborda los grandes temas, y el más grande es detener a Quentin Hapsburg (Robert Goulet) en su plan para destruir el medio ambiente.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policia? 33 1/3: el insulto final
programme.desc: La noche de los Óscar(r). ¿Puede alguien echar ese zoquete? ¡Esperen! No es un zoquete cualquiera, es el Tte. Frank Drebin. ¡Y se coló para detener un atentado terrorista!

programme.title: S.O.S. Hay un loco suelto en el espacio
programme.desc: El héroe espacial Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) y su amigo medio canino Barf (John Candy) están en una misión en su casa rodante voladora para salvar a la princesa Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) de Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) en una parodia inspirada en Mel Brooks.

programme.title: El Infierno (LAS)
programme.desc: Benny has been deported from the United States back to a Mexico that is being ripped apart by warring drug cartels. He gets involved in the narco business and begins to rocket up through the ranks, and is surrounded by money, women, violence, and fun.

programme.title: Mama para rato
programme.desc: En el Día Sagrado de las Muertes, una madre regresa y descubre que sus tres hijos son desconsiderados, feos y vagos.

programme.title: Mariachi gringo
programme.desc: Edward es un joven que vive en un pequeño pueblo estadounidense y encuentra la pasión en la música tradicional mexicana, por lo que viajará a Guadalajara con un solo objetivo: convertirse en mariachi.

programme.title: Rojo
programme.desc: Un misterioso hombre llega a una ciudad y sin motivo aparente agrede a Claudio, un exitoso abogado. Tras un intento fallido, los ataques continúan, lo que despierta la ira de la esposa de Claudio.

programme.title: Amor, dolor & viceversa
programme.desc: Una película de crimen y suspenso sobre sueños inquietantes que se convierten en realidad para dos personas.

programme.title: Ma Ma
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Penelope Cruz delivers the performance of her career as Magda, a woman who is determined to live life to the fullest in the face of her recent breast cancer diagnosis. In

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Deseo navideño cumplido
programme.desc: Cuando Megan, de nueve años, dedica su deseo navideño a ayudar a su madre Cara a encontrar el amor, su carta termina volviéndose viral. ¿Cara seguirá el consejo de su hija y encontrará el amor?

programme.title: Ballet para la Navidad
programme.desc: Cuando la profesora de ballet Olivia elige a Lily para "El Cascanueces", se enamora del padre de Lily, Michael. ¿Podrá Olivia hacer realidad los deseos de todos esta Navidad?

programme.title: Un baile de realeza en Navidad
programme.desc: Una bailarina retirada que asiste a embajadores reales organiza El Cascanueces. Termina en el centro de un inesperado romance navideño.

programme.title: El vuelo antes de Navidad
programme.desc: Dos extraños que por casualidad trabajan en marketing comparten una habitación en un bed and breakfast cuando una tormenta de nieve retrasa su vuelo en Montana la víspera de Navidad.

programme.title: Mi amor en navidad
programme.desc: Lucas, un famoso cantante cuyo mayor éxito ha sido "Mi Amor en Navidad", decide tomarse un descanso, volviendo a su pueblo natal para pasar las fiestas. Allí se reencuentra con Elisa, su primer amor y la inspiración de su éxito navideño.

programme.title: Scream 2
programme.desc: En la universidad, Sidney Prescott creyó que al fin había dejado atrás el terror... hasta que un asesino imitador empieza a interpretar una secuela real donde nadie está a salvo ni libre de sospecha.

programme.title: Scream 3
programme.desc: La primera película estableció las reglas. En la secuela, la apuesta es mayor. En la tercera entrega de la exitosa franquicia "Scream", todo es posible. Es un juego insidioso de caos de película de terror con sorprendentes giros y vueltas.

programme.title: Habitación Ouija
programme.desc: Una mujer agorafóbica comienza a convocar espíritus para que sean sus amigos mientras su hermano / cuidador no está durante el día, pero cuanto más tiempo pasa con los espíritus, más claro se vuelve que no son tan amigables después de todo.

programme.title: Mega Piranha (LAS)
programme.desc: Una cepa mutante de pirañas feroces gigantes escapan del Amazonas y se dirigen a Florida.

programme.title: El cuarto piso
programme.desc: Una mujer hereda un apartamento de alquiler controlado y un vecino la aterroriza. Protagonizada por Juliette Lewis, William Hurt y Shelley Duvall.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: Una joven manifiesta estigmas como los que Jesucristo sufrió en su cricifixión. Ni médicos ni psiquiatras pueden darle ninguna explicación, sólo un sacerdote enviado por el Vaticano la ayudará, aunque tenga que ir en contra de algunas de sus creencias.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: Cattle Annie And Little Britches
programme.desc: Two young aspiring outlaws (Amanda Plummer and Diane Lane) manage to join what’s left of the Doolin-Dalton gang, led by the aging Bill Doolin (Burt Lancaster). The gang’s heyday may be far behind them, but there’s still plenty of adventure left!

programme.title: Valley Of Fire
programme.desc: Gene Autry is the new mayor of a lawless town. He has to rid the town of its gambling king and to import a group of gals to settle the men. Gene must out-gun renegades who want to kidnap the gals.

programme.title: Whirlwind
programme.desc: Gene Autry arrives in Red Bluff to work on the investigation of mail robberies. U.S. Bonds are stolen, and Smiley finds burned fragments of them. A henchman confesses who the guilty party is.

programme.title: King of the Cowboys
programme.desc: Saboteurs are blowing up government warehouses (during World War II). Roy and his pals work undercover to put an end to their operations.

programme.title: The Last Of The Mohicans
programme.desc: As Alice and Cora Munro attempt to find their father they are set upon by French soldiers and their cohorts, Huron tribesmen. Fighting to rescue the women are Chingachgook the last of the Mohican tribe, and the frontiersman known as Hawkeye.

programme.title: Return of the Seven
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates, and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: Guns Of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: Roustabout
programme.desc: Elvis is a karate-chopping biker who’s hired as a carnival Roustabout. At first, he just provides muscle and a diversion for the beautiful carny girls. Then he picks up a guitar and gets the midway rockin’.

programme.title: Frankie and Johnny
programme.desc: Join Elvis Presley and Donna Douglas for a riverboat ride of rollicking musical entertainment in this charming and sassy comic hit about a gambler and his lady love.

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He’s a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King…but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: Easy Come, Easy Go
programme.desc: On his last day in the Navy, frogman Elvis discovers a sunken treasure ship. On his first day as a civilian, Elvis starts his new job—self-employed treasure hunter!

programme.title: Clambake
programme.desc: The king of rock 'n' roll, Elvis Presley, is as a lonely million-heir who gives up his fortune and trades identities with a water ski instructor to learn about life from the bottom up in this musical romp! Bill Bixby and Shelley Fabares also star.

programme.title: Pink Panther Strikes Again
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Dreyfus (Herbert Lom) is finally driven mad by Inspector Clouseau's (Peter Sellers) incompetence and commandeers a doomsday device along with a demand for Clouseau’s death. Are 26 hired assassins a match for Clouseau's dumb luck?

programme.title: What's New Pussycat?
programme.desc: Peter Sellers, Peter O'Toole and Woody Allen star in this wacky chapter from the swinging '60s where therapy becomes hilarity

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Being her time of the month, Gloria is in a complete foul mood and gets into a big argument with Edith, lambasting her for letting Archie boss her around.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike's artist friend, Szabo, is coming to the Bunker's house. Archie is a bit perplexed for two reasons. First, he is Hungarian. The other is that he sketches models in the nude. Szabo gets a great idea that Gloria should pose in the nude for him.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is furious with his houseguest, Cousin Oscar. When they were kids, Oscar bullied Archie and now Oscar is taking full advantage of his visit at the Bunkers. Archie wants to throw him out, but Oscar makes an exit of his own when he turns up dead.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude forces Vivian to attend the funeral of a 'dear friend' they both hated, and the ordeal is worsened by a revelation in the 'Unending Slumber Room.'

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude begins to panic when she finds herself locked in a file closet with a highly incompatible person...her ex-husband Chester.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Mrs. Naugatuck is upset after her wedding plans hit a snag, and a well-meaning offer from Maude makes a bad situation unbearable. Luckily, Carol's sensitivity gives Mrs. Naugatuck a shoulder to cry on.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter's worries over a business loan ruin his vacation, and then he receives word that may ruin his life.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter is in the depths of despair after losing his appliance store to bankruptcy, and Maude's efforts to improve his mental disposition result in disaster.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: An apprehensive Maude visits Walter the day after his suicide attempt, and learns of some complications that may delay his return home, on the conclusion of a three-part episode.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix Unger, hired to photograph a dog food commercial featuring "Silver, The Wonder Dog," feels the animal is being maltreated, so "accidentally" lures him away to save him.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar loses money in a poker game and when he can't pay the debt in cash, he donates Felix's band, the Sophisticados, to Billie Joe as payment instead.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: When Oscar learns the park where he and his cronies played baseball is going to be the site for an office building, Oscar becomes civic-minded and decides to run for city councilman.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Singer-composer Paul Williams is the special guest star in this episode written especially for him. Felix Unger's daughter has a crush on Williams and runs away from home to follow him wherever he appears.

programme.title: My Three Sons

programme.title: The Maury Show: 10 Moms. 12 Kids. Who’s The Dad? Part 1
programme.desc: We’ve got so much paternity action we can’t fit it all in one show. “You Are the Father” could be the sweetest words these men could ever hear. Will the results be make our guest cheer or tear?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Brittany thinks Dionte is her baby’s dad and will prove it! Then, 24-year-old Melissa claims 47-year-old Rob fathered her baby, but Rob’s daughter wants proof! Plus, is Crystal’s baby’s dad her ex, ex’s cousin, or her husband?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé Deon get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, William believes that his 2 of his 6 kids with ex-wife Nicole aren’t his and could be the father of another’s woman’s kid! Our DNA tests reveal the truth!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Could La’Nell be the grandmother of her sister-in-law Savanna’s baby if she slept with her teen son James? Plus, Sholonda told her husband that he might not be their daughter’s father, but after 17 DNA tests, they’re back today!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, Don and Amy are back for another lie detector test! This time Don wants to know if Amy is sleeping with his brother! Will they ace their tests?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Men Tested … Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Teshinya suspects that Clarence is picking up women at church and went undercover to get proof! Desirae is 17 and 5 months pregnant, but thinks her boyfriend Chris is cheating with her friend!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Why don’t 21-year-old Q and 55-year-old Alicia have sex more often? Then, Jenny fell for a man 10 years her junior and has been finding pictures of naked women on his phone but has he been cheating?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, los bomberos de California habían combatido diez incendios provocados en tres semanas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora
programme.desc: Una joven productora de noticias de televisión es violada y asesinada en su apartamento. La policía identifica a dos sospechosos, pero ambos son absueltos de cualquier delito.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía de Seattle no tenía sospechosos en el violento asesinato de la cantante post-grunge, Mia Zapata.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue el accidente automovilístico más mortal en la historia de los Estados Unidos. Casi un centenar de vehículos participaron, doce personas murieron y más de cincuenta resultaron heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El caso musical
programme.desc: En 1999, una niña de 12 años fue encontrada asesinada en su casa y cambió la sensación de seguridad que tenían los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Waseca, Minnesota.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad de 2005, se encuentra el cuerpo de un hombre ardiendo cerca de Baltimore. Finalmente fue identificado como Wesley Person, de 26 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mark Fair se fue a trabajar y su prometida, Karla Brown, se quedó en casa. Más tarde, la encontró muerta. Durante la autopsia, se volvieron a examinar las marcas de mordeduras en su cuerpo y la odontología forense identificó al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2007, el trailer de Effie y Michael Ratley en Florida se incendia y Michael heroicamente rescata a su esposa e hijo. Un mes después, su esposa es encontrada golpeada hasta la muerte en una habitación de la casa de sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La coartada
programme.desc: En 1991, una chica de secundaria desaparece después de asistir a una fiesta. El principal sospechoso no tenía a un pero dos testigos que le daban coartada para la noche en que desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía de Virginia Beach llegó al departamento de Makdessi para encontrar los cuerpos ensangrentados de Elise Makdessi y de Quincy Brown, un soldado de la Marina. ¿Pero era el amante de Elise o su agresor?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de policía muy respetado es asesinada en su propio hogar. El crimen quedó sin resolver por más de una década, hasta que se forma una nueva unidad de casos sin resolver, que le dan un nuevo vistazo a la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Ryan Stallings, de cuatro meses, muere en circunstancias sospechosas, su madre finalmente es condenada por su asesinato. Pero meses después, surgen nuevas pruebas de una fuente sorprendente – su hermano recién nacido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, de 35 años, fue condenada por el asesinato de David Nixon en Abril del 2002 después de que él había planeado terminar su relación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es apuñalada más de 100 veces. El asesino deja atrás el ADN, pero los investigadores deben jugar al gato y al ratón para obtener el ADN de un sospechoso que coincida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un tiroteo desde un vehículo deja un hombre muerto y otro gravemente herido. Las llamadas de teléfonos celulares y los casquillos de bala apuntan a un sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, el desarrollador inmobiliario de Colorado, Alan Helmick, fue encontrado muerto a tiros en su casa por su esposa Miriam, quien luego se convirtió en la principal sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Aunque su hija ha escapado antes, ella siempre ha regresado. Sus padres estaban seguros de que esta vez no sería diferente, pero estaban equivocados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de un rico empresario estadounidense fue encontrado en su auto de alquiler. Los dientes y fragmentos de huesos fueron los únicos restos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los sobrevivientes de las atrocidades nazis reconocieron al arzobispo Trifa, exjefe de la Iglesia Ortodoxa Rumana en los Estados Unidos, por haber dirigido un sangriento ataque contra los judíos durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una trágica jugada del destino, pocos días después de que la mujer vendiera su casa y se mudara a un modesto remolque, un incendio se llevó tanto el remolque como su vida. Pero la autopsia demostró que no fue un accidente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Apenas unas semanas antes de que una testigo testifique contra el hombre acusado de agredirla sexualmente, ella es asesinada en el patio delantero de su propia casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A la mano
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía acusado de matar a su ex esposa insiste en que ella se suicidó. Los investigadores dicen que fue un asesinato, que era físicamente imposible que la mujer se disparara.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: If the candidates thought auditions were tough, they have no idea how brutal training camp will be. Kelli has to call three girls into her office for warnings...who will survive the first week of training camp?

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A Connecticut bank executive is targeted by criminals who force him to rob his own bank.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A series of mysterious events haunt 16-year-old Cassie Jo Stoddart while housesitting, and days later, she's found stabbed to death; police retrace her last day and uncover a stockpile of evidence pointing right to her killers.

programme.desc: When a millionaire is found dead in the trunk of her car, authorities become suspicious of her ex-husband.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The 2004 murder of a young casino sales executive in Las Vegas.

programme.desc: A man claims his young wife killed herself after she is found dead in her burning home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The murder of a young businessman in Old San Juan, Puerto Rico, marks the start of a 15-year-long hunt to find the killer.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A look back at the 1997 murder of fashion designer Gianni Versace, including interviews with his long-time partner Antonio D'Amico, model Beverly Johnson, fashion journalist Hal Rubenstein, author Maureen Orth and more.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman seeks the truth when her whirlwind romance turns into a mystery with government agents, cryptic messages and international spies.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A murder case considered closed by North Dakota detectives is suddenly reopened when a confidential informant comes forward with a tip about an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: After the Lovin (Reunion)
programme.desc: Flavor Flav and all 20 of the Flavorettes from season 2 are back for a reunion show like you've never seen before.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Back to the Rocking Horse
programme.desc: Twenty more beautiful babes vie for his love and affection. Some bare more than their souls in an attempt to grab Bret's attention.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Peep Show
programme.desc: In the first ever Peep Show Contest, the girls all compete for a date with Bret by showing off their greatest “talents.”

programme.title: Rock of Love: Stroller Derby
programme.desc: But things turn ugly when the most hated girl in the house gets alone time with Bret – the fangs come out and the girls are out for blood!

programme.title: Rock of Love: A Ride on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Bret wants a girl with good manual skills so he tests their aptitude with nuts and bolts in a custom motorcycle build off.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Mud Bowl II
programme.desc: The “Divine Nine” compete in the second annual Bret Michaels Mud Bowl!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Once a Cowgirl
programme.desc: For the two women who have yet to win a date with Bret, Rodeo's Rocking Rodeo could be their last chance to make a connection.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Red, White and a Little Blue
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls display their ability to rock an audience as they perform at a USO show for military veterans.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Video Vixens
programme.desc: With only six girls left in the house, tensions run high as Bret tests the girls' creativity by making them shoot, direct and edit their own music videos.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Going to Ex-tremes
programme.desc: Bret shocks the girls by inviting their exes. He takes the guys out on the town to dig up dirt on the girls.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bitter Suite
programme.desc: Bret surprises the final four with a trip to Las Vegas. One girl's lies cause Bret to question her intentions toward him.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Rockin’ the ‘Rents
programme.desc: Bret wants to know more about the three remaining girls, and what better way to get the 411 than moving their parents into the house!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bret’s Rock of Love
programme.desc: Bret takes his final two girls south of the border to spend some quality, romantic time with each one before making his final choice.

programme.title: Rock of Love: The Reunion
programme.desc: Tonight Bret and all of the girls reunite to rekindle the friendships and rivalries that made the house such a unique place.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane admits to herself that her issues with her dad go deeper than the divorce – she thinks maybe he did things to her. Jane is very confused and feels alone. Lucas gives Jane a hard time for creating tension between mom and dad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s tired of being referred to as Kelly’s girlfriend and Blonde Emma – she’s not even blonde anymore! Determined to create a distinct university identity, Emma borrows some pot that was gifted to Kelly and smokes up with Becca and Gwyneth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli wants Johnny to like her, a lot. She worries she’s going to lose him to an older more “experienced” girl so to make sure she keeps her man close, Alli decides to play with the big kids at a ravine party.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Stress is at an all-time high at Degrassi with exams approaching and course selections due for next term.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Blue asks Holly J to the winter dance in a very romantic way. Only problem? Holly J thinks she might have a thing for her co-worker, Spinner. While Blue is a dreamboat, Spinner is a goofball.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Mia is offered a MAJOR modeling contract in Paris, Peter decides he’ll go with her. But he soon realizes he doesn’t fit into her sophisticated world.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Stephanie uses her new-found sexuality to campaign for the school presidency, her best friend questions her motivation and her methods. Meanwhile, Stephanie's younger brother Arthur is having difficulty adjusting to grade seven.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Voula disobeys her Old World father and sneaks out to the school dance. But when Stephanie gets too drunk to deliver her speech, Voula has to take over, risking exposure of her deception.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When LD.'s father is suddenly taken to the hospital, LD. Is terrified that she will lose him, as she lost her mother. Meanwhile, Melanie has to confront her own unfounded fear when a snake gets loose in school.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Feeling unfairly treated by Mr. Raditch, Yick puts his name on an old paper of Stephanie's to test his teacher's response. Meanwhile, Joey sells phony drugs to Melanie and Kathleen.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Rick, the school tough guy, is a loner who rarely speaks to anyone. When Joey visits Rick's home, he is horrified to discover that his new friend's bruises are inflicted by his own father. Joey wants to help but doesn’t want to betray Rick's confidence.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Responding to sexist taunts, the girls' swim team challenges the boys' soccer team to a battle of the sexes. But when star swimmer Melanie gets teased about her first bra, she pulls out of the race.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Whispered stories about Caitlin's favorite teacher, Ms. Avery, hint that she is a lesbian. Troubled by the accusations and by doubts about her own sexuality, Caitlin confronts Ms. Avery, who helps her understand that rumors never tell the whole story.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When LD.'s father is suddenly taken to the hospital, LD. Is terrified that she will lose him, as she lost her mother. Meanwhile, Melanie has to confront her own unfounded fear when a snake gets loose in school.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Peter discovers his recreational drug was not-so-recreational meth, he swears he’ll never touch the stuff again. But with the reality of coming down, Peter realizes he just wants more.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Club Fair Day and Alli and Clare sign up for the Photography Club. Watch out Annie Leibovitz! Everyone who’s anyone is getting involved in something – except Johnny.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Spinner have been through so much together. They’re best friends. Jane’s just come out of a difficult year at home, so hanging out with Spinner is safe and… easy. That’s not a bad thing, right?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli insists she’s done with Johnny. When she breaks into his locker to steal nude photos of herself back, she, in fact, realizes that she’s so not over him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Holly J team up for a practicum business assignment and immediately bond over their idea to start a babysitting agency.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: News travels fast about Riley and Sam’s big fight. Riley doesn’t think much of it – until rumours start spreading that Sam was gay-bashed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Matchmaker week at Degrassi and Declan’s not interested in a serious relationship. The Diplomat brat is here for a good time, not a long time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.
